message: Welcome to MoodScale. How can we help you today?

children.label: Services
children.description: Therapy, wellness programs, and organizational solutions

children.title: What is Individual Therapy?
children.message: Individual therapy is a collaborative process between you and a licensed mental health professional. It provides a safe, confidential space to explore thoughts, feelings, and behaviors while developing coping strategies.

children.title: What therapeutic approaches are used?
children.message: Our therapists use evidence-based techniques including CBT, DBT, and mindfulness-based interventions. Each treatment plan is customized to your unique concerns and goals.

children.title: Who can benefit from individual therapy?
children.message: Individual therapy can help with anxiety, depression, trauma, relationship issues, life transitions, stress management, and personal growth.

children.title: What should I expect in sessions?
children.message: Your first session includes a comprehensive assessment. Regular sessions last 50 minutes, typically weekly or bi-weekly. Sessions are available online or in-person.

children.title: How much does individual therapy cost?
children.message: Individual therapy sessions start at ₹2,500 per session. Package deals for multiple sessions are available. Contact us to discuss payment plans.

children.label: Couples Therapy
children.description: Strengthen your relationship through professional guidance

children.title: What is Couples Therapy?
children.message: Couples therapy helps partners improve their relationship through structured sessions. You learn to communicate effectively, resolve conflicts, and deepen emotional connection.

children.title: What approaches do you use?
children.message: We use evidence-based methods including Emotionally Focused Therapy (EFT) and the Gottman Method in a neutral, supportive environment.

children.title: What issues can couples therapy address?
children.message: We help with communication difficulties, trust issues, intimacy concerns, conflict resolution, life transitions, parenting disagreements, and financial stress.

children.title: What should we expect in sessions?
children.message: Initial sessions explore your relationship history and goals. Sessions last 60–90 minutes with both partners. Progress is reviewed regularly.

children.title: How much does couples therapy cost?
children.message: Couples therapy sessions start at ₹3,500 per session. Package options and extended sessions are available. Same pricing applies for individuals and couples on platform plans.

children.label: Group Therapy
children.description: Healing and growth through shared experiences

children.title: What is Group Therapy?
children.message: Group therapy brings together individuals facing similar challenges with professional guidance. It provides peer support, diverse perspectives, and a safe, confidential environment.

children.title: What are the benefits of group therapy?
children.message: Benefits include reduced isolation, validation through shared experiences, learning from others' coping strategies, and developing interpersonal skills.

children.title: What types of groups are offered?
children.message: Groups cover anxiety and depression support, grief and loss, addiction recovery, trauma healing, social skills development, and stress management.

children.title: How do groups work?
children.message: Groups have 6–10 members meeting weekly for 90-minute sessions. Facilitators lead structured discussions, exercises, and skill-building activities.

children.title: How much does group therapy cost?
children.message: Group therapy sessions are ₹1,500 per session. Most groups require a minimum 8-week commitment. Contact us for current group openings.

children.title: What is Psychological Consultation?
children.message: Psychological consultation involves comprehensive evaluation by a licensed psychologist to assess and address mental health conditions using evidence-based interventions and testing.

children.title: What services are provided?
children.message: Services include diagnostic evaluation, psychological testing, treatment planning, psychotherapy, and coordination with other healthcare providers.

children.title: When should I seek psychological consultation?
children.message: Consider it for persistent mental health symptoms, psychological assessment needs, evidence-based therapy, or complex conditions requiring specialized expertise.

children.title: What happens in the initial consultation?
children.message: The first appointment lasts 60–90 minutes and includes evaluation, history review, symptom assessment, and initial treatment recommendations.

children.title: How much does psychological consultation cost?
children.message: Initial consultations are ₹3,500, with follow-up sessions at ₹2,000. Contact us to discuss payment options and package deals.

children.title: What corporate programs does MoodScale offer?
children.message: We offer Employee Assistance Programs, executive wellness packages, team workshops, and bulk session packages tailored to organizations of all sizes.

children.title: What is included in the EAP?
children.message: EAP includes 24/7 crisis helpline access, unlimited email support, monthly wellness webinars, quarterly assessments, and dedicated therapist matching. Packages start from ₹500/employee/month for 50+ employees.

children.title: What bulk pricing discounts are available?
children.message: Volume discounts: 20% off for 10–25 sessions, 30% for 26–50, 35% for 51–100, and up to 45% off for 100+ sessions with custom enterprise pricing.

children.title: Do you offer team workshops?
children.message: Yes. Workshop topics include stress management, psychological safety, communication skills, workplace anxiety, and building mentally healthy teams for 10–500 participants.

children.title: How do I get a custom corporate quote?
children.message: Submit your organization details on our custom pricing page. Our team will contact you within 24 hours with a tailored proposal.

children.label: Features & Programs
children.description: Personal growth, wellness centers, and nature retreats

children.title: What is Personal Growth & Development?
children.message: Evidence-based personal development programs combining academic excellence, professional growth, and life skills mastery to help you achieve your goals.

children.title: What is Goal Achievement Mastery?
children.message: A strategic goal-setting framework using SMART methodology, weekly accountability sessions, and a performance metrics dashboard to track progress.

children.title: What is the Academic Excellence Program?
children.message: Enhance learning with neuroscience-based study methods, memory optimization techniques, and focus enhancement training tailored to your learning style.

children.title: What is Career Development & Leadership?
children.message: Accelerate professional growth with executive coaching, professional communication training, and strategic networking for career advancement.

children.title: How do I get started?
children.message: Begin with a free assessment or schedule a consultation to explore which personal development program fits your goals.

children.title: What are Holistic Wellness Centers?
children.message: State-of-the-art centers offering integrated programs combining traditional wisdom and modern therapeutic approaches for complete well-being.

children.title: What is Yoga & Movement Therapy?
children.message: Therapeutic yoga, somatic movement, and breathwork sessions designed to release tension, build resilience, and restore inner balance.

children.title: What group programs are available?
children.message: Anxiety support groups, mindfulness circles, and peer support networks in a safe, facilitated environment.

children.title: What integrative therapies are offered?
children.message: Art and music therapy, nutritional counseling, and biofeedback training for comprehensive mind-body wellness.

children.title: How do I begin my wellness journey?
children.message: Visit our wellness centers page to explore programs and connect with our team to find the right program for you.

children.title: What is the Nature Retreat Experience?
children.message: Transformative nature retreats in carefully selected sanctuaries combining therapeutic benefits of natural environments with evidence-based mental wellness practices.

children.title: What are Forest Therapy Sessions?
children.message: Guided forest meditation, sensory awareness walks, and nature connection rituals using scientifically-proven forest bathing techniques.

children.title: What are Mountain Meditation Retreats?
children.message: High-altitude retreats with silent meditation, sunrise yoga sessions, and peak mindfulness practices for clarity and renewal.

children.title: What are Coastal Wellness Experiences?
children.message: Ocean sound therapy, beach meditation walks, and tidal breathing exercises harnessing the therapeutic power of marine environments.

children.title: How do I join a nature retreat?
children.message: Explore retreat programs on our Nature Retreat page and contact our team to learn about upcoming experiences.

children.title: Who are MoodScale therapists?
children.message: All therapists are licensed mental health professionals with extensive training. They hold relevant degrees in psychology, counseling, or related fields and are certified practitioners.

children.title: How do I browse therapists?
children.message: Visit our Therapists page to browse certified mental health professionals and find the expert who's right for your journey.

children.title: How does therapist matching work?
children.message: Our platform offers expert therapist matching based on your needs. After assessment, we help connect you with the right professional for your goals.

children.title: How do I book a session?
children.message: Book a session through our platform after browsing therapists. Flexible scheduling with online and in-person options is available.

children.title: Are sessions online or in-person?
children.message: Therapy sessions are available both online and in-person based on your preference. All sessions are conducted in a confidential environment.

children.title: What is the therapy journey on MoodScale?
children.message: Start with assessment, consult with a psychologist, begin therapy sessions, and receive ongoing support with progress tracking and 24/7 premium support.

children.title: What is the BFI-10 Personality Assessment?
children.message: A quick 10-item personality assessment based on the scientifically validated BFI-10 measuring the Big Five personality dimensions. Takes about 5 minutes.

children.title: What will I discover?
children.message: You'll receive Big Five personality traits analysis, behavioral pattern understanding, and personal strengths identification using a validated tool.

children.title: Is this assessment free?
children.message: Yes, the BFI-10 Big Five Personality Assessment is a free assessment available on MoodScale.

children.title: How do I start the assessment?
children.message: Visit our Assessments page and select the BFI-10 assessment to begin. Answer carefully designed questions based on established psychological frameworks.

children.title: What is the GAD-7 Anxiety Assessment?
children.message: A clinically validated 7-item screening tool for Generalized Anxiety Disorder based on DSM-IV criteria. Takes about 10 minutes.

children.title: What will I discover?
children.message: You'll receive a generalized anxiety assessment with quick, reliable results and professional interpretation guidance.

children.title: Is this assessment free?
children.message: Yes, the GAD-7 Anxiety Assessment is a free screening tool available on MoodScale.

children.title: How do I start the assessment?
children.message: Go to our Assessments page and select GAD-7 to begin. Results help guide your therapy sessions and personal growth journey.

children.title: What is the ASRS-v1.1 ADHD Assessment?
children.message: A WHO-developed 18-item scale for screening adult ADHD symptoms based on DSM-IV criteria. Takes about 12 minutes.

children.title: What will I discover?
children.message: You'll receive adult ADHD symptom evaluation, attention pattern analysis, and professional recommendations.

children.title: Is this a premium assessment?
children.message: Yes, the ASRS-v1.1 Adult ADHD Self-Report Scale is a premium assessment on MoodScale.

children.title: How do I start the assessment?
children.message: Visit our Assessments page and select the ASRS-v1.1 assessment to begin your screening.

children.title: How do MoodScale assessments work?
children.message: Take the assessment, receive a comprehensive report with insights, then use your results to guide therapy sessions and personal growth.

children.title: What is the difference between free and paid assessments?
children.message: MoodScale offers free basic assessments like BFI-10 and GAD-7, plus detailed paid evaluations including premium tools like ASRS-v1.1 for deeper insights.

children.title: Are assessments scientifically validated?
children.message: Yes. Our assessments are scientifically validated, HIPAA compliant, and used by 5000+ clients. They are designed by mental health professionals.

children.title: Can I discuss results with a therapist?
children.message: Yes. Discuss your assessment results with certified psychologists to create a personalized treatment plan based on your mental health profile.

children.title: Where can I explore all assessments?
children.message: Visit our Assessments page to explore all available psychological assessments and start your discovery journey.

children.title: What is the Essential Care plan?
children.message: Essential Care is ₹1,199 per session (save 52% from ₹2,500). Includes one 50-minute session, expert therapist matching, 24/7 email support, and post-session guidance.

children.title: What is the Premium Journey plan?
children.message: Premium Journey is ₹3,999 per package (save 67% from ₹12,000). Includes 4 sessions, 1 assessment session, a wellness report, personalised scheduling, and 24/7 priority support.

children.title: What is the Transformative Care plan?
children.message: Transformative Care is ₹12,599 per program (save 50% from ₹25,000). Includes 12 sessions, 4 psychometric assessments, monthly and annual wellness reports, and 24/7 priority support.

children.title: Is pricing the same for individuals and couples?
children.message: Yes. All plans have the same price for individuals and couples. There are no hidden fees.

children.title: Do you offer enterprise or bulk pricing?
children.message: Yes. We offer customized mental health programs including Employee Assistance Programs, executive wellness packages, and tailored workshops. Request a custom quote on our corporate pricing page.

children.title: How much do individual therapy sessions cost?
children.message: Standalone individual therapy sessions start at ₹2,500. Package plans on our pricing page offer significant savings. Couples sessions start at ₹3,500 and group sessions at ₹1,500.

children.title: What is MoodScale and how does it work?
children.message: MoodScale is a comprehensive mental health platform connecting individuals with licensed therapists and counselors. We offer personalized therapy sessions, mental health assessments, and wellness resources through convenient online sessions.

children.title: Who are your therapists and counselors?
children.message: All therapists are licensed mental health professionals with extensive training and experience. They hold relevant degrees in psychology, counseling, or related fields.

children.title: How much do sessions cost?
children.message: Plans start at ₹1,199 per session (Essential Care). Premium Journey is ₹3,999 for 4 sessions and Transformative Care is ₹12,599 for 12 sessions. Individual sessions start at ₹2,500.

children.title: Is my information secure and confidential?
children.message: Yes. Our platform is HIPAA-compliant and all communications are encrypted. Your personal information and session content are strictly confidential.

children.title: What is MoodScale's mission?
children.message: To provide evidence-based mental health assessments and resources that help individuals better understand and improve their mental wellbeing through accessible technology.

children.title: Is live chat support available?
children.message: Yes. Live chat support is available 24/7 with instant response from our support team.

children.title: Can I call for support?
children.message: Phone support is available Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM–8:00 PM. Call +91 9145607891 to speak with a representative.

children.title: How do I reach email support?
children.message: Email support is always open at contact@moodscale.in with responses within 24 hours.

children.title: Where is the Support Center?
children.message: Visit our Support Center for live chat, phone, and email support options. Our team is committed to helping you every step of the way.

children.title: Is MoodScale a crisis helpline?
children.message: No. MoodScale is not a medical service or suicide prevention helpline. If you are in immediate distress, contact Tele MANAS: 1 800 891 4416 or AASRA: +91 22 2754 6669.

children.title: Where can I get immediate help?
children.message: For suicidal thoughts or immediate distress, contact a 24×7 suicide prevention helpline: Tele MANAS 1 800 891 4416 or AASRA +91 22 2754 6669.

children.title: Where is MoodScale located?
children.message: Almasoul Consulting Private Limited, 7th floor, Icon Tower, Baner Road, Laxman Nagar, Baner, Pune, Maharashtra - 411045, India.

children.title: What is the contact phone number?
children.message: Call us at +91 9145607891 during office hours for assistance.

children.title: What is the contact email?
children.message: Email us at contact@moodscale.in for inquiries. We respond within 24 hours.

children.title: What are the office hours?
children.message: Monday–Friday: 9:00 AM–8:00 PM. Saturday: 10:00 AM–6:00 PM. Sunday: By appointment only.

children.title: How do I send a message?
children.message: Use the contact form on our homepage to share your name, email, phone, service needed, and message. Our team will get back to you promptly.
